details.test: Task 1: Add two black-and-white cityscape prints under $50 with 4+ stars to cart
Task 2: Build small abstract gallery wall under $90 (using available abstract prints)
Task 3: Search prints, compare two options, add cheaper one to cart
Task 4: Apply coupon ART10 at checkout for order over minimum amount
Task 5: Add two prints under $150, one framed and one unframed, and estimate shipping
Task 6: Create wishlist of prints and move cheapest one to cart
Task 7: Select two small prints under $35 each for kids room (adapted)
Task 8: Find highest-rated horizontal print under $200 and add to cart
Task 9: Order two copies of B&W print with 18x24 size, matte paper, and hardware flag
